description: OlympiadMAS — 5 test-based multi-agent olympiads (+ IEO Business Case rubric-based pilot)
note_on_30: Collect one full published team task per slot (internal sub-parts stay together). Combine across years/contests to reach 30 where history allows; some olympiads have fewer than 30 available.

olympiads.name: International Junior Science Olympiad — Practical (Team)

gold_scores.notes: Marking schemes in answer PDFs. Gold practical team = top /40.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full team practical per IJSO year; ~30 editions since 2004

olympiads.name: International Economics Olympiad — Business Case
olympiads.collection_strategy: One full business case per IEO year (2021–2025 available so far)

olympiads.name: International Linguistics Olympiad — Team Contest

gold_scores.notes: Solutions PDF per year. Human gold e.g. 200.0/200 (2025 Taiwan).

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full team contest per year; 2003–2025

olympiads.name: International Olympiad on Astronomy and Astrophysics — Group Competition

gold_scores.notes: Marking schemes in solution PDFs. Winner = fastest team.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full group competition per IOAA edition (2007–2024)

olympiads.name: ARML Power Contest

gold_scores.notes: Solution PDFs published each season. Top teams 36–40/40.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full power round per contest season (~2/year since 1994)

olympiads.name: European Union Science Olympiad (EUSO/EOES)

gold_scores.notes: Human scores as %. Top e.g. 97.5/100 (Germany 2004). Marking schemes need manual collection.

olympiads.collection_strategy: One full team experiment per slot; 2 experiments/year × 15 years (2003–2017)
